title: asteriscus spinosus subsp. asteroideus
intro: Asteriscus spinosus subsp. asteroideus, also known as the False Chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Asteriscus spinosus subsp. asteroideus include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and menstrual cramps.
